violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of Champs Chicken Country Breading were stored on the floor under the deli counter.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.m Filters in the hood system need to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. A sleeve of black foam meat trays was stored on the floor under the meat counter.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors under the stove, fryer, and rotisserie need to be cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Approved, safe, unadulterated, approved additives, proper receiving temperature (4 pts deducted)
